a.xlink:title: This represents either the llvm.coro.id.retcon or llvm.coro.id.retcon.once instruction.
This represents a common base class for llvm.coro.id instructions.
A wrapper class for inspecting calls to intrinsic functions.
This class represents a function call, abstracting a target machine's calling convention.
Base class for all callable instructions (InvokeInst and CallInst) Holds everything related to callin...
Mixin base class that is used to add getParent() and setParent(ParentTy*) methods to ilist_node_impl ...
An ilist node that can access its parent list.
